name: monitor
description: Monitor your Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode sessions — a usage dashboard (sessions, tokens, cost, model mix, project activity) plus a per-project cockpit (goal capture, decision log, live session view).

hooks.command: echo 'Thoughtful mode is on for this session: when you finish something genuinely worth recording (a non-obvious decision, deliberate-but-odd code, a tricky learning, or a sharp caveat), spawn a background fork with `subagent_type` omitted running `/cockpit scribe`. One fork per logical chunk; skip trivial edits.' || true
